meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances
meta.project_subject: Extension of SCDPM PMU from 11.02.2024 to 31.03.2024
meta.deliverables: Monitoring progress on SCDPM Portal; Data analytics of SCDPM data; Drafting agenda for monthly review meetings; Preparing presentations/reports on ministry updates; Monthly best-practices analysis; Monthly Secretariat Reforms report; Any other tasks assigned by DARPG.

content.full_text: The Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances (DARPG) extends Quality Council of India’s SCDPM PMU engagement from 11 Feb 2024 to 31 Mar 2024. A three-member QCI professional team will monitor the Special Campaign for Disposal of Pendency Matters portal, perform data analytics, draft monthly review-meeting agendas, prepare progress presentations, analyse best practices, and compile monthly Secretariat Reforms reports. Deliverables are governed by mutual milestones; payment is Rs 7,65,000 for professional fees plus Rs 91,800 (12 %) administration cost, totalling Rs 8,56,800 (GST extra). Payment schedule: 25 % on award, 50 % on 20 Mar 2024, 25 % on 28 Mar 2024, each upon invoice. Services may be discontinued if unsatisfactory.
